author: tmiychao
content:
<@&857649635274915900> Welcome to week 5 everyone! We are now month into the fellowship, culminating the initial research and moving towards proposing projects. 

Hope you are all doing well preparing your proposal. We are already seeing first projects coming in, thank you so much for trailblazing. I will review them soon, lot's of PRs and messages dropped during the weekend so I'll be catching up. Also to note, I am going for a work trip this week so I'll be a bit more limited in my capacity/response time. But always feel free to reach out if you need any feedback before submitting the projects or have any questions. 

Come to share your progress and chat with us as always, 3PM UTC for weekly standup! Looking forward to see you all soon
